name: 3HSPlug
description: GM/GS Compatible Multi-timbal 8-operator FM/PCM Syntheizer, uses 3HS88PWN4 (Fantasy sound chip) to make sound.

name: 8ridgelite
description: 8 string guitar virtual instrument

name: ADLplug
description: FM Chip Synthesizer — OPL & OPN

name: Spice FX - Open Source Edition
description: A high-quality analog saturation VST3/AU/LV2 plugin with multiple distortion models. Open sourced in October 2025.

name: ÆLAPSE
description: ÆLAPSE is a delay and reverb plugin. The delay is based on tape-delay mechanisms, while the reverb is inspired by (but not limited to) spring reverbs.

name: Airwindows
description: Various small and experimental effect plugins

name: ampli-Fe
description: Cross-platform VST2 plugin written in Rust

name: amsynth
description: Analog-modelling (virtual analog) synthesizer

name: andes
description: Sound synthesiser plugin based on Perlin noise

name: Argotlunar
description: Real-time delay-line granulator

name: Audible Planets
description: An expressive, quasi-Ptolemaic semi-modular synthesizer

name: Audio Effects
description: Plugins implemented from the explanations in the book “Audio Effects: Theory, Implementation and Application”

name: Bespoke
description: Node-based modular synth with live coding

name: BinAural VST
description: Mono-to-stereo plugin that positions sound in a 3D space using Head-Related Transfer Functions

name: BiRR
description: BiRR (and her ambisonic sister AmbiRR) are room simulators that accurately emulate the sound produced by two monophonic and omnidirectionnal sources perceived by a listener in a rectangular (2D) or parallelepipedic (3D) room. The dimensions (x,y,z) of the room can be adjusted, as well as the source and listener positions. The generated stereo output can simulate different microphone positions (XY, MS, with different angles), or a binaural receiver.

name: BlackBird
description: Analog-inspired software synth with its own voice

name: blocks
description: Polyphonic modular synth

name: BORIS Granular Station
description: A live-input granular plugin

name: Breathalyzer
description: Breathalyzer is a VST3 instrument that turns MIDI notes into playable breath-and-voice gestures. It is not a sample player and not a speech synthesizer. The design goal is a compact expressive instrument whose mouth color, noise, growl, and vowel motion can all be performed from a small control surface.

name: C1Bitcrusher
description: Experimental and accurate bit reduction

name: Calf Studio Gear
description: Many LV2 and Jack audio plug-ins

name: Cardinal
description: Virtual modular synthesizer plugin

name: Chorus Ex Machina
description: Physically modelled chorus synthesizer

name: CHOW
description: Maximally truculent distortion effect

name: Cloud Seed
description: Algorithmic reverb for emulating huge, endless spaces and modulated echoes

name: CloudReverb
description: This is an audio plugin for algorithmic reverb. The algorithm is borrowed from [CloudSeed VST](https://github.com/ValdemarOrn/CloudSeed/tree/legacy-v1) by Valdemar Erlingsson.

name: Cocoa Delay
description: Warm and lively delay

name: Convolver
description: Impulse-response reverb

name: cStop
description: Tape stop

name: Curvessor 2
description: [Curvessor](https://www.unevens.net/curvessor.html) is an audio plug-in that implements a dynamic range processor in which the response curve of each channel is an automatable spline.

name: DAFx19-Gamelanizer
description: Accompanying material for the paper 'A Real-Time Audio Effect Plug-In Inspired by the Processes of Traditional Indonesian Gamelan Music'

name: Dexed
description: DX7 FM plugin synth

name: Digits
description: Phase-distortion synth inspired by Casio CZ series

name: Disflux
description: Disflux is a free and open-source phase dispersion effect designed to add insane amounts of punch, depth, and character to your sound.

name: Distrho glBars
description: OpenGL bars visualization plugin (as seen in XMMS and XBMC/Kodi) adapted from jack_glbars

name: Distrho Kars
description: Simple karplus-strong plucked string synth based on the karplong DSSI example synth

name: Distrho Mini-Series
description: Collection of small plugins based on LOSER-Dev Plugins

name: Distrho MVerb
description: DPF-based version of MVerb

name: Distrho ndc Plugs
description: DPF-based versions of some of ndc Plugs

name: Distrho Nekobi
description: Simple single-oscillator synth based on Roland TB-303

name: Distrho ProM
description: Music-visualizer plugin based on projectM

name: Dragonfly Reverb
description: Hall-style reverb based on Freeverb3 algorithms

name: Drops
description: Single file audio player

name: Drummock
description: Drum sampler plugin with retro pitch shifting and hard clipper. Just drag and drop to load samples and start playing.

name: Element
description: Advanced Audio Plugin Host

name: Eurorack
description: Diverse set of physical modeling sources, organic processors, wavetable oscillators, waveshapers, granular synths, and utility modules

name: FILT-R
description: FILT-R is a cross-platform filter modulator based on plugins like ShaperBox and FilterShaper. It is the second version of [FLTR-1 JSFX](https://github.com/tiagolr/tilr_jsfx?tab=readme-ov-file)

name: Flutterbird
description: Simple pitch fluctuation

name: FreeEQ8
description: FreeEQ8 is a professional-grade, free and open-source 8-band parametric EQ plugin for macOS, Linux, and Windows.

name: GainPlugin
description: (Experimental) VST/AU audio plugin example based on JUCE with React-JUCE for UI.

name: GATE-12
description: GATE-12 is a cross-platform envelope generator for gate/volume control inspired by plugins like GrossBeat and ShaperBox. It is the second version of [GATE-1](https://github.com/tiagolr/gate1) rebuilt from scratch using the JUCE framework.

name: Gverb/Gigaverb
description: Reverb

name: Hammer & Meißel
description: Hammer & Meißel is a keytracked polyphonic modal filter (and more).

name: Helm
description: Polyphonic synth with lots of modulation

name: hexter
description: Yamaha DX7 modeling FM synth for DSSI

name: HiLoFilter
description: Simple hipass/lopass filter controlled with a single knob

name: Hue
description: Mixes various noise types into the audio signal

name: INTERSECT
description: INTERSECT is a sample slicer instrument plugin (VST3/AU/Standalone) with multi-sample sessions, per-slice locking, slice note ranges, multiple time/pitch algorithms, and MIDI-triggered slice playback.

name: jc303
description: A Free Roland TB-303 Plugin for Windows, MacOS and Linux: VST2, VST3, LV2 and AU. A JUCE port of Open303 engine

name: JS Inflator
description: JS Inflator is a copy of Sonox Inflator.

name: JuceOPLVSTi
description: FM synth based on Yamaha OPL2/3 emulation from DOSBox

name: Juno 6
description: Roland Juno 6/60 Synthesizer

name: Just a Sample
description: Just a Sample is a powerful, modern audio sampler, with a focus on simplicity and ease of use. Best of all, it's free and open-source! I spent a lot of time on this project, and I think it will be a great addition to your plugin collection.

name: K-Meter
description: Implementation of a K-System meter according to Bob Katz’ specifications

name: keithhearne/VSTPlugins
description: Collection of VST plugins

name: Key Repeat
description: Beat repeat sampler

name: KickMaker
description: Synth specifically to create kick-drum sounds

name: LameVST
description: LameMP3 as an effect

name: LIRA•8
description: The Lira•8 is a digital attempt at emulating SOMA Lab's Lyra-8 signal flow and sound.

name: Magical8bitPlug 2
description: Old 8bit game console style synth

name: mda
description: FX and virtual instruments for PC and Mac

name: mda-plugins-juce
description: JUCE implementations of the classic MDA audio plug-ins

name: Microbiome
description: Microbiome is a real-time audio effects plugin that uses delay lines and looping to create vibrant audio artifacts mimicking the nature of evolutionary biology.

name: MidiChords
description: Detect chord names from a MIDI track and display them in a scrolling window during track playback

name: Mika Micro
description: Simple subtractive synth

name: Modal Synthesiser
description: This is a software synthesiser that uses modal synthesis, a physical modelling technique using banks of resonators to filter an exciter signal, to create sounds with a parametrically controlled frequency spectrum. This synthesiser is designed to allow for the composition and performance of spectral music, and it produces sounds with timbres similar to those of natural materials such as wood, metal, and glass.

name: modEQ
description: EQ with modulation (VST3, AU)

name: MultiMeter
description: A comprehensive set of AU/VST audio analysis tools (level meters, histograms, spectrogram analyzer, goniometer, correlation meter)

name: Musializer Plugin
description: Spectrum visualizer plugin

name: MVerb
description: Studio-quality reverb using the Dattorro’s figure-of-eight reverb structure

name: ndc Plugs
description: VST plugins for Windows and OSX

name: Neural Amp Modeler LV2
description: Neural amplifier modeler, LV2 version of Steven Atkinson's NAM plugin

name: Neural Resonator VST
description: This is a VST plugin that uses a neural network to generate filters based on arbitrary 2D shapes and materials. It is possible to use midi to trigger simple impulses to excite these filters. Additionally any audio signal can be used as input to the filters.

name: Ninjas 2
description: Sample slicer, rewrite of Ninjas

name: NotNotchFilter
description: Performance-oriented filter designed to replace the mid-EQ found in a standard 3-band DJ mixer

name: OB-Xd
description: Based on the Oberheim OB-X

name: OctaSine
description: VST2 frequency modulation synthesizer written in Rust

name: Odin2
description: Polyphonic Synth

name: Overdraw
description: [Overdraw](https://www.unevens.net/overdraw.html) is an audio plug-in that implements a waveshaper in which the transfer function of each channel is an automatable spline.

name: OwlBass
description: Additive bass synth

name: Oxe FM Synth
description: Multitimbral 8-operator FM synth (VST 2.4; Windows, Linux, macOS)

name: PeakEater
description: PeakEater is a free, easy-to-use wave-shaping plugin. PeakEater lets you choose between different [wave-shaping](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Waveshaper) [functions](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sigmoid_function) to clip everything above ceiling level. Therefore, you can boost the overall volume of your track safely without worrying that some nasty peak would go above the maximum allowed volume level of your DAW.

name: Plasma
description: Plasma is a free & open-source distortion powerhouse for VST3 hosts. Originally designed for Hardstyle, Gabber, Hardcore, and anything that needs raw, aggressive energy, Plasma lets you twist and destroy your sound with 12 brutal distortion styles and filters with extreme resonance capabilities.

name: plugdata
description: Plugin wrapper around Pure Data, letting it be used as a plugin in your DAW

name: Pulp Fiction
description: Multi-effects rack plugin

name: PulseDelay
description: Timed delay effect

name: QDelay
description: QDelay (short for quick-delay) is a dual-delay with more features than it should for a free plugin that's supposed to be quick. While it offers nothing groundbreaking it is based on popular units like ReplikaXT and EchoBoy. The main goal is to create a free and open plug-in for my own productions, an alternative to the popular [Deelay](https://sixthsample.com/deelay/) by SixthSample without premium versions or trimmed features or on-line activation.

name: QtVST
description: VST plugins with a Qt interface

name: RCSiner
description: RCSiner is an audio plugin that employs phase-distortion and waveshaping techniques utilizing the sine function. It provides a collection of selectable formulas, each equipped with three adjustable parameters and the capability to transform through multiple processing stages. This versatile tool offers and extensive range of sonic possibilities, from subtle harmonic saturation to full-on destruction of the audio signal.

name: RE201models
description: This repository is dedicated to digital modelling of the Roland RE-201.

name: REACH
description: Extraterrestrial Reverb for Electronic Music

name: REEV-R
description: REEV-R is a cross-platform convolution reverb with modulation for pre/send and post/volume signals.

name: Regrader
description: Degenerative delay

name: Resonarium
description: Resonarium is a MPE-compatible physical modeling synthesizer, based on coupled string waveguide models. It is designed to encourage abstract sound design, exploration, and open-ended play.

name: RipplerX
description: RipplerX is a physically modeled synth, capable of sounds similar to AAS Chromaphone and Ableton Collision.

name: Roth-AIR
description: Mixing tool for easily adding airy, crispy presence to audio

name: Rotor
description: Rotor is a variable waveform ring modulation plugin targeting VST3 and AU for OS X and Windows platforms. It uses wavetable synthesis to generate various simple waveforms that act as the modulation signal for the input. It is compiled using the [JUCE](https://juce.com/) framework for C++.

name: Schrammel OJD
description: Model of a modern classic guitar distortion pedal

name: ScorchCrafter Guitar FX
description: Audio DSP FX and plugins, mostly for guitar (amp sim) and other FX

name: Scream
description: Scream is a versatile VST plugin that recreates the legendary Scream filter from Massive. Known for its aggressive, resonant tone and raw energy.

name: Setekh
description: A minimalistic yet sonically powerful distortion plugin created and distributed via Full FX Media

name: sfizz
description: SFZ parser library and instrument plugins

name: ShoutVST
description: VST for streaming sound into Icecast/Shoutcast directly from VST hosts

name: Sirial
description: Sirial is a Rhythmic Delay where each tap can be placed and configured with different amplitudes and feedback giving total control on how the delay responds and the patterns it creates.

name: SmartGuitarAmp
description: Guitar amplifier-style plugin, that uses machine learning for emulating real world hardware

name: SmartGuitarPedal
description: Guitar pedal-style plugin, that uses machine learning for emulating real world hardware

name: Sound Analyser
description: Real-time audio analysis to allow anyone to quickly set up and experiment with different algorithms

name: Sound of Music
description: Multiband bitcrusher

name: SPARTA
description: Spatial audio focused plug-in suite (Ambisonics encoders/decoders, 3-D panners/spatialisers, etc.)

name: SpectralAbyss Multiband-Saturation
description: SpectralAbyss is a multiband saturation audio plugin built with [JUCE](https://juce.com/). It allows the distortion of three individual frequency bands using two different distortion algorithms.

name: Squeezer
description: Compressor with side-chain, several detection modes and filters, etc

name: Stone Mistress
description: Phase Shifter and Chorus audio plugin, inspired by Electro-Harmonix Stereo Electric Mistress and Small Stone pedals

name: Surge
description: Subtractive wavetable synth

name: Synister
description: Subtractive synth

name: Syntage
description: VST 2.4 .Net Study Synth

name: TeAr
description: TeAr is an advanced polyrhythmic and polyphonic MIDI arpeggiator plugin. It features four independent arpeggiator engines, each with its own pattern, subdivision, and MIDI output channel. This allows for the creation of complex, evolving musical phrases and textures.

name: Temper
description: Digital distortion targeting VST, VST3, and AU for OS X and Windows

name: The Analog Molecule
description: JSFX Based frame plugin for Reaper.

name: There will be blood
description: Drum bleed reduction plugin

name: TIME-12
description: TIME-12 is a cross-platform is a delay modulator inspired by plugins like GrossBeat and ShaperBox. It can be used for a wide range of effects like stuttering, tape stop, glitch, scratch, reverse, pitch shift and more. It is the second version of [TIME-1](https://github.com/tiagolr/time1) rebuilt from scratch using the JUCE framework.

name: traKmeter
description: Loudness meter for correctly setting up tracking and mixing levels

name: Transfer
description: Transfer is a waveshaper based distortion, except the transfer function is JIT compiled from text inputted by the user. Starting as a tool for testing different transfer functions in other projects, it has evolved into a pretty cool and unique plugin (disclaimer it might not be that unique I have done absolutely no market research whatsoever). It also has a built in gate, and an emphasis filter, which applies the filters to the signal pre waveshaping, then applies the exact opposite filter post waveshaping. Due to popular demand (by popular I mean that one guy on reddit), it now also has has 16x oversampling and you can't turn it off sorry I don't make the rules.

name: Tunefish
description: VST virtual analog synthesizer

name: Uhhyou Plugins
description: Uhhyou Plugins Collection

name: Valentine
description: Valentine is a compressor and distortion processor. It was inspired by the hyper compressed and crushed textures in the seminal Justice record, †. Using it is easy: turning input up makes the signal louder, more compressed, and more saturated. Turning crush up adds digital distortion.

name: Vaporizer2
description: Hybrid wavetable additive / subtractive VST / AU / AAX synthesizer / sampler workstation plugin

name: VCV Rack
description: Virtual modular synth

name: Vital
description: Spectral warping wavetable synthesizer

name: VST2413
description: FM synth based on emulator of YM2413 (OPLL) chip used in Sega Master System and FM-PAC MSX expansion

name: VstProfiler
description: We are working on an open source JUCE vst3 plug-in that capture guitar amplifier and cabinet and emulate them in real time for guitarists.

name: VSTSID
description: SID synthesizer instrument

name: WarpCore
description: WarpCore is a multi-band spectrum inversion plugin, similar to the time-domain local spectrum inversion effect of PiWarp/Wormhole.

name: Wavetable
description: A 2 oscillator wavetable synth with flexible modulation options

name: WebCZ101
description: Virtual CZ101 synth in a browser

name: WebDX7
description: Virtual Yamaha DX7 synth in a browser

name: Wolf Shaper
description: Waveshaper plugin with spline-based graph editor

name: YK Chorus
description: Chorus audio effect plugin based on DSP code by TAL

name: zam-plugins
description: LADSPA/LV2/VST/JACK audio plugins for high-quality processing

name: zynaddsubfx
description: Additive/Subtractive AM/FM synthesizer with effects
